overview: FreshAlert is a high-fidelity interactive prototype for a smart expiry reminder mobile app. Built with Material Design 3 aesthetics, it features a vibrant green-yellow-red color system for tracking food and medicine expiry dates, neumorphic cards, smooth animations, and 5 fully interactive screens including dashboard, add product, categories, product detail, and settings — all with dark/light mode support.
features: Add product with camera scanner preview and date picker
Category filter tabs with progress circles
Product detail view with Use Now, Share, Delete actions
Animated FAB and confetti on save
Search and voice icon in app bar
Neumorphic Material Design 3 cards with 24dp corners
